---
title: "Day 17: Departure from Rome"
subtitle: "Arrivederci, Italia!"
date: "2026-06-20"
day-of-week: "Friday"
location: "Puglia → Rome → Madison"
categories: [itinerary, departure, travel]
---

## Overview

**Final day:** Early morning travel from Puglia to Rome Fiumicino airport, departure flight to Madison. The journey home begins.

---

## Early Morning: Puglia Departure (Time TBD)

### Logistics (To Be Confirmed with Tour)

**Options:**

**Option A: Travel to Rome June 19 Evening**
- More relaxed morning June 20
- Stay near FCO airport
- Early morning to airport (30 min)

**Option B: Very Early June 20 Departure**
- Depart Puglia 4-5 AM
- Train/private transfer to Rome
- 4-6 hours travel time
- Arrive FCO with time to spare

**Coordination Needed:**
- When does Puglia tour end? (Evening June 19 or morning June 20?)
- Where does tour end? (Brindisi? Bari? Lecce?)
- Best route to Rome FCO from end point?

**See:** [Trains Research](../research/trains.qmd) for Puglia to Rome connections

---

## Rome Fiumicino Airport (FCO)

### Flight Details

**See:** [Flights Research - Return Flight](../research/flights.qmd#return-flight-june-20-2026)

**Typical Schedule:**
- **Departure:** Early morning from Rome FCO
- **Connection:** European hub (likely same as outbound)
- **Arrival:** Chicago/Madison same day (time zones work in our favor)

**Airport Arrival:**
- **3 hours before international flight**
- Check bags
- Security
- Find gate
- Duty-free shopping if time

---

## Flight Home

### Transatlantic Journey

**On the Plane:**
- You're tired but full of memories
- Review photos
- Start planning next trip?
- Or just sleep

**Connection:**
- Follow signs for connecting flight
- May need to clear U.S. customs/immigration at hub OR final destination
- Depends on routing

**Arrival Madison/Chicago:**
- Same day as departure (cross 6 time zones east to west)
- Jet lag will be different direction (easier for most)
- Claim bags
- Reunite with home

---

## Reflections

### Trip Highlights

**Favorite City:**

**Best Museum/Art:**

**Best Meal:**

**Most Surprising:**

**Would Return To:**

**Recommendations for Future Travelers:**

### Italy Memories

**What I'll Miss Most:**

**What I Learned:**

**Photos to Print:**

**Stories to Tell:**

---

## Post-Trip Checklist

### In Next Few Days

- [ ] Unpack (or at least rescue dirty laundry)
- [ ] Download all photos from devices
- [ ] Back up photos (cloud + external drive)
- [ ] Start photo album or blog
- [ ] Send thank-you notes if relevant
- [ ] Review credit card charges
- [ ] Write reviews for tours/hotels used
- [ ] Share favorite restaurant recommendations
- [ ] Update this website with actual experiences!

### Update This Site

- [ ] Add photos to daily pages
- [ ] Complete "Notes & Reflections" sections
- [ ] Update Puglia pages with actual tour details
- [ ] Write "reality vs. plan" comparisons
- [ ] Share link with friends/family

---

## Final Thoughts

**The Trip in Numbers:**
- **Days:** 17
- **Cities:** Pisa, Florence, Naples, Puglia towns
- **Museums:** Uffizi, Accademia, Bargello, Pitti, MANN, Cappella Sansevero, more
- **Pizzas:** Hopefully at least 3
- **Gelatos:** Lost count
- **Steps:** Probably 100,000+
- **Memories:** Priceless

**You came to Italy for:**
- Renaissance art ✓
- Roman archaeology ✓
- Incredible food ✓
- Hidden gems of Puglia ✓
- Life-changing travel ✓

**Mission accomplished.** 🇮🇹

---

## Until Next Time

*"Arrivederci, Italia! We'll be back."*

---

**Previous:** [Day 16: Puglia Day 6](day-16-2026-06-19-puglia.qmd)

**Return to:** [Trip Home Page](../index.qmd)
